name: Himalayas Jobs
description: Adds a remote job search tool powered by the free Himalayas Remote Jobs API for approved threads.

access.name: Job search
access.description: Expose Himalayas remote job search tools to selected threads.

tools.name: search_remote_jobs
tools.description: Search remote jobs through the Himalayas API and return a markdown table. Required: query (q accepted as alias). Optional filters: country, worldwide, excludeWorldwide, seniority, employmentType, company, timezone, sort (relevant, recent, salaryAsc, salaryDesc, nameAToZ, nameZToA, jobs), page. Results preserve applicationLink as the canonical apply URL and include Himalayas attribution.
